mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) EVENT-COUNTER denominator VARIES by realm/event — this stream uses (N/25) (Cube God 3/25, Shadowscale 9-10/25, Asgard Guardian 2/25, Ghost Ship 17/25, Skull Shrine 22/25), whereas disc_wsRSijbExRI used /30. So the realm-event tracker is per-realm-configurable, not a fixed /30. (2) POTION OVERFLOW -> VAULT: once a stat is maxed (8/8), further stat potions auto-route to storage — verbatim 'You're already maxed. Potion of Life has been sent to [vault]' + same for 'Potion of Mana'. Adds to the stat-pot cap system. (3) STARFORCE zone has a boss 'The Zuck'. (4) '8/8' stat-maxing culture ('are you 0/8 shaming', 'shame we have a bunch of 0/8s').
